=== Verify fix: compute_ss instantiation in wrapper ===
// Compute subsystem instantiation
// NOTE (PnR fix): wrapper was generated with JTAG ports (tck/tms/tdi/trst_n)
// but compute_ss uses SWD (swclk/swdi/swdo/swdo_en). Replaced with correct SWD
// port connections; debug inputs are tied-off as no SWD pad exists in this wrapper.
mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss u_core (
    .clk(clk_in),
    .reset_n(reset_n_xres_h_n),
    .swclk(1'b0),
    .swdi(1'b0),
    .swdo(),
    .swdo_en(),
    .halted(),
    .qspi_sck(),
    .qspi_ce_n(),
    .qspi_din(4'b0),
    .qspi_dout(),
    .qspi_douten(),
    .clk_rst_pwr_prdata(32'b0),
    .clk_rst_pwr_pready(1'b1),
    .clk_rst_pwr_pslverr(1'b0),
    .io_cfg_ss_prdata(32'b0),
    .io_cfg_ss_pready(1'b1),
    .io_cfg_ss_pslverr(1'b0),
    .gpioa_in(w_gpioa_in),
    .gpioa_out(w_gpioa_out),
    .gpioa_oe(w_gpioa_oe),
    .gpiob_in(w_gpiob_in),
    .gpiob_out(w_gpiob_out),
    .gpiob_oe(w_gpiob_oe),
    .gpioc_in(w_gpioc_in),
    .gpioc_out(w_gpioc_out),
    .gpioc_oe(w_gpioc_oe)
);

endmodule

`default_nettype wire

message:
Running command: # Monitor synthesis progress — poll every 90 seconds for up to 3 hours
WRAPPER_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"
LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/wrapper_run.log"

for i in $(seq 1 120); do
  sleep 90
  STEP=$(ls -td "$WRAPPER_DIR/runs/wrapper_run/"[0-9]* 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  LAST_LINES=$(tail -3 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null)
  YOSYS_PID=$(pgrep -f "yosys.*synthesize.py" 2>/dev/null)
  OR_PID=$(pgrep -f "openroad" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  LR_PID=$(pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" 2>/dev/null)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] Poll $i | LibreLane PID: ${LR_PID:-none} | Yosys: ${YOSYS_PID:-done} | OpenROAD: ${OR_PID:-none}"
  echo "  Current step dir: $STEP"
  echo "  Last log lines: $LAST_LINES"
  echo ""

  # If librelane is done, break
  if [ -z "$LR_PID" ]; then
    echo "LibreLane process exited. Checking results..."
    break
  fi
done
